verifyDescription: Please enter the PIN sent to your email to verify your account.
verifyPinHint: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email
verifyCodeExpired: Verification code has expired. Please refresh to get a new code.
verifyInvalidCode: Invalid verification code or reset failed
verifyError: Error verifying code. Please try again.
verifyRefreshError: Error refreshing code. Please try again.
homeHeroPitch: Experience the ultimate multiplayer board gaming platform. Connect with friends worldwide and enjoy classic games in stunning digital format.
homeWhyChoosePitch: We've built the most advanced multiplayer board gaming experience with cutting-edge features
homeRealTimeMultiplayerPitch: Play with friends in real-time with our advanced WebSocket technology. No lag, no delays.
homeInteractiveTutorialsPitch: New to the game? Step-by-step tutorials guide you through rules, strategies, and moves — practice against AI at your own pace before jumping into real matches.
homeCrossPlatformPitch: Play seamlessly across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices. Your progress syncs everywhere.
homePopularGamesPitch: Discover our most loved board games played by millions of players worldwide
homeGameCardPitch: Join thousands of players in this classic strategy game. Perfect for all skill levels.
homeCtaPitch: Join millions of players worldwide. Create your account and start your board gaming journey today!
footerDescription: Experience the thrill of multiplayer board games online. Connect with friends and players worldwide.
footerCopyright: © 2025 Board Game Arena. All rights reserved.
resetPasswordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
resetPasswordInvalidCode: Invalid verification code or reset failed
resetPasswordError: Error resetting password. Please try again.
resetPasswordEmailValid: Email exists, please enter verification code and new password
resetPasswordPinHint: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email
resetPasswordDescription: Please fill in all required information to reset your password.
notFound_description: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for.
tutorial_step0_message: Goal: collect 15 points before your opponent to win.
tutorial_step0_subMessage: Points come from development cards and Noble tiles.
tutorial_step1_message: Pay attention to the cost below to buy this card
tutorial_step1_subMessage: Note: each turn you can only have up to 10 gems — you must discard excess at the end of the turn.
tutorial_step2_message: Each turn you can take up to 3 different gems from the bank, but since you are aiming for the first card, choose Blue, Red, Purple.
tutorial_step2_subMessage: Choose 3 different gems — prioritize the color of the card you just saw to get closer to buying it!
tutorial_step3_message: If the bank has ≥4 gems of the same color, you can take 2 at once, but since you are aiming for the first card, take 2 Green.
tutorial_step3_subMessage: Choose a color that has ≥4 and take 2 gems! Remember: total gems cannot exceed 10.
tutorial_step4_message: Cards have a bonus color (top right) and cost (bottom) and points if applicable (top left). Buy cards to get a permanent bonus that can substitute for gems.
tutorial_step4_subMessage: Bonuses count as gems when buying future cards!
tutorial_step5_message: You have enough gems to buy this card. Click on it and select Purchase!
tutorial_step5_subMessage: Spend gems → receive its permanent bonus.
tutorial_step6_message: Reserve a good card to keep it — get 1 gold gem 🟡(acts as a wildcard for any gem).
tutorial_step6_subMessage: Click on an expensive level 2 card and select Reserve!
tutorial_step7_message: Gather the required bonuses → A Noble visits automatically, +3 points!
tutorial_step7_subMessage: No action needed — Nobles visit after buying a card.
tutorial_overlay_actionRequired: Perform the action above to continue...
botwon_desc:
You have grasped the basics of Splendor.
Try playing with real players now!
botwon_learn2: Buying cards to accumulate points & bonuses
botwon_learn3: Reserving cards strategically to block opponents
botwon_button: 🏠 Back to Lobby & Play with real players
freeplay_desc: From now on you are completely free — no more tutorials.
skip_desc: You will go straight into free play mode against the Bot.
login_required_join_desc: Choose how you want to play
login_required_with_account_desc: Save progress, track stats, climb ranks
guest_modal_warning: Playing as guest — your progress won't be saved after the session ends.
guest_modal_auto_gen: Auto-generated — change it if you want
guest_modal_desc: Choose a display name to start playing right away.
guest_modal_err_min: Name must be at least 2 characters
guest_modal_err_max: Name must be at most 20 characters
guest_modal_err_fail: Failed to create guest session. Please try again.
lobby_rooms_desc: Join an existing room or create your own
lobby_first_room: Be the first to create a room and start playing!
room_detail_not_found_desc: The room you're looking for doesn't exist or has been closed.
game_skip_desc: Cannot collect gems, buy cards, or reserve. Pass your turn.
discard_desc: You have too many gems. Please discard {excessCount} gem(s).
noble_desc: You qualify for multiple nobles. Please select one.
reserve_deck_desc: Are you sure you want to reserve a random Level {level} development card from the deck?
card_action_desc: What would you like to do with this card?
lobby_create_err_pwd: Password is required for private room
lobby_create_desc: Set up your new game room.
lobby_join_private_desc: Enter the room password to join
profile_name_min: Name must be at least 2 characters
profile_name_max: Name must be at most 16 characters
profile_name_invalid: Name must not contain spaces or special characters
profile_pwd_new_min: Password must be at least 6 characters
profile_guest_warning: Guest accounts cannot update profile or change password. Please register for a full account.
